decodeDebugFollowUp.interpretation: The blocker is not BOM handling, base64 normalization, padding, URL-safe alphabet handling, whitespace, or local Brotli support. The decoded bytes are stable but are not accepted by standard Brotli decoders for this package.
decodeDebugFollowUp.productProvidedBrotliHelperFinding: C# Compress returns MemoryStream.ToArray after Flush and before BrotliStream disposal; local streaming decode emits complete parseable JSON then reports unexpected end of file.

signingApiCheck.interpretation: The server signing API accepts and verifies the original package when /v1 is appended to the configured base URL. This proves wrapper signing/verification for the original valid Resource, but does not prove local Resource decode or content mutation.
